name.description: The name of the Azure Data Factory.

public_network_enabled.description: Is the Data Factory visible to the public network?

identity_type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Data Factory

identity_ids.description: Specifies a list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs to be assigned to this Data Factory.

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
